call_transcript:
Agent: Hi Eleanor, this is Mark calling from Finance Solutions. I see you recently inquired about a personal loan on our website. Um, how are you doing today? 
Eleanor: Good, thanks. 
Agent: Great! So, based on your application, we are pre-approving you for a $10,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 8.99%. This could really help with, you know, consolidating debt or maybe a home improvement project? 
Eleanor: I was thinking more about a car. 
Agent: Excellent! A car is a great use of funds. Now, the monthly payments would be approximately $198 for 60 months. Does that sound manageable? 
Eleanor: Hmm, yeah, that's… okay. What are the fees like? 
Agent: There's a one-time origination fee of $200, and that's it. No prepayment penalties. We pride ourselves on transparency. 
Eleanor: Okay. And the APR is… 8.99%? Just confirming. 
Agent: Yes, absolutely. 8.99%. We can get the paperwork started right away if you'd like. It's all digital, very convenient. 
Eleanor: Alright, let's do it. Sounds good.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Miller? This is Sarah calling from Finance Solutions. We're offering a special promotion on our Signature Credit Card. 
Robert: Where did you get my number? I didn't give anyone permission to call me. 
Agent: Sir, we… uh… it's a marketing list. We're offering a $5,000 Signature Credit Card with an interest rate of 19.99%. 
Robert: 19.99?! Are you kidding me? That's outrageous! I already have a credit card. 
Agent: Well, sir, this card offers rewards points and… 
Robert: No, thank you. Don't call me again. *click*

Agent: Hi Jessica, this is David from Finance Solutions. I'm calling regarding a pre-approved Personal Loan. 
Jessica: Oh, okay. My friend mentioned you guys. 
Agent: Wonderful! Yes, we have a great relationship with [Referral Partner]. We are pre-approving you for a $15,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 7.49%. What are you hoping to use the funds for? 
Jessica: I'm thinking about renovating my kitchen. It's… a big project. 
Agent: A kitchen renovation is fantastic! We can definitely help. The monthly payments would be around $281 for 60 months. 
Jessica: That sounds… pretty good. What about fees? 
Agent: There's a $300 origination fee, but we can sometimes waive that for preferred customers. Let me check… Yes, I can waive the fee for you. 
Jessica: Really? That's awesome! 
Agent: Absolutely. So, we're looking at a $15,000 Personal Loan at 7.49% with no origination fee. Are you ready to proceed? 
Jessica: Um… let me just quickly check my budget… yeah, okay, let's do it. I'm ready.

Agent: Hello, Mr. Davis? This is Lisa from Finance Solutions. We're offering a low introductory rate on our Signature Credit Card. 
Michael: (Yelling) You guys called me *yesterday*! I told you I'm not interested! Where did you even get my number?! 
Agent: Sir, I apologize for the inconvenience. We… uh… 
Michael: Inconvenience?! This is harassment! I want my number removed from your list *immediately*! 
Agent: Sir, I can certainly… 
Michael: No, you can't! Just… *click*.

Agent: Hello, Mrs. Rodriguez? This is Kevin calling from Finance Solutions. I see you filled out an application for a personal loan on our website. 
Patricia: Oh, yes, dear. I did. I'm a little hard of hearing, could you speak up a bit? 
Agent: Certainly, Mrs. Rodriguez. My apologies. We are pre-approving you for an $8,000 Personal Loan at a rate of 14.99%. Are you looking to use the funds for anything specific? 
Patricia: Well, my grandson needs help with his college tuition. It's… quite expensive these days. 
Agent: That's wonderful of you to help him. The monthly payments would be approximately $178 for 60 months. 
Patricia: 178… hmm. Could you repeat that, dear? 
Agent: Certainly. $178 per month for 60 months. There's a $150 origination fee, but we can discuss that further. 
Patricia: Oh, a fee. I see. 
Agent: Yes, but it's a one-time fee. We can also explore options to lower the interest rate if you have a co-signer. 
Patricia: A co-signer… I'll have to think about that. Could you send me some information in the mail? I'm not very good with computers. 
Agent: Absolutely, Mrs. Rodriguez. I'll send you a detailed brochure with all the information. And my direct extension if you have any questions. Would that be alright? 
Patricia: That would be lovely, dear. Thank you so much.
